# ShakiLabs UI artifact

`shakilabs-ui-0.2.2.tgz` is the active exact artifact for `@shakilabs/ui` 0.2.2.

- Source repository: `00.root-shakilabs`
- Source commit: `fdbd587`
- SHA-256: `646e784575b28455a2b87f32e530175ae238ff039730217dcdea82e226c8263e`
- Rollback artifacts: `shakilabs-ui-0.2.1.tgz`, `shakilabs-ui-0.1.0.tgz`

All artifacts are committed so an isolated Vercel checkout can run `npm ci` without a private registry token.
